name: PIZZA GUY
description:
" It's PIZZA time "

Yello! I've decided to make a Pizza game bot featuring Pizza guy, since I noticed that there weren't any Pizza game bots on this website, so I decided to make my own!

Feel free to give me any suggestions as to what I should add or change for this bot.

Also it's not my fault if the bot acts ooc, breaks, or starts acting for you, the only thing I can really do is add more details or rewrite the bot so it works

This is also going off my headcanons of him! So it won't be as accurate as canon

🔞 NSFW is fine as long as you OR your character/sona IS OF AGE 🔞
